summary: Keep daily recommendations fail-closed, reading-log state and metadata internally consistent, and fallback excerpts filtered and bounded.
reason: Local database failures must not disable anti-repeat behavior, status-only updates must preserve supplied book metadata while clearing stale completion data, and unusual Gutenberg layouts must not expose front matter as a reading excerpt.
validated_outcome: Regression tests cover database error propagation, read-to-reading transitions with title and rating preservation, reserved query encoding, and filtered bounded verse fallback.
